title: Project: World Traveller
objectives: Research and present information about a chosen country
Practise travel vocabulary in a meaningful project context

key_concepts.explanation: Students choose a destination and create a country profile poster including: Country's Name, Official Language, Capital, Landmark, a drawing or picture representing the country, a Fun Fact, and Famous Food from the country.

solution_steps: Fill in: Country's Name, Official Language, Capital, Landmark
Draw or paste a picture that represents this country
Write a fun fact about this country
Write a famous food from this country
examples.answer: A completed country profile with all fields filled in
examples.visual_description: A poster template with passport and airplane graphics, fields for country info, a drawing area, and space for fun fact and food

teaching_notes: This project develops research skills and global awareness. Students can use books, the internet, or ask family. Encourage choosing countries from different continents. Good for class presentations — students present their 'destination' to the class.
